Registry / Terms / protective interface

protective interface

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00350 · 10 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 9 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

9 distinct definitions across 10 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical2010202X
interface which only allows the introduction of data into the data processing device of the taximeter, which cannot: - display data that are not clearly defined and which could be taken as being a measurement result; - falsify displayed, processed or stored measurement results or primary indications; -adjust the instrument or change any adjustment factor
Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Consistency
20102007OIML R 21:20072.2.700350pending
202X2007OIML R 21:20072.2.700350pending

8 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102006OIML R 76-1:2006T.2.3.600909
- - - interface (hardware and/or software) which only allows the introduction of such data into the data processing device of an instrument, module or electronic component, which cannot: display data which are not clearly defined and which could be taken for a weighing result; falsify displayed, processed or stored weighing results or primary indications; or adjust the instrument or change any adjustment factor, except releasing an adjustment procedure with incorporated devices or, in the case of class I instruments with external adjustment weights as well
pending
202X2020OIML R150-1:20202.2.11.203395
interface (hardware and/or software) which only allows the introduction into the instrument of data or instructuons that cannot influence the metrological properties of instrument
pending
202X2017OIML R061-1:20173.3.1003679
interface (hardware and/or software) which only allows the introduction of data or instructions that cannot influence the metrological properties of the instrument
pending
202X2006OIML R 76-1:2006T.2.3.600909
interface (hardware and/or software) which only allows the introduction of such data into the data processing device of an instrument, module or electronic component, which cannot: display data which are not clearly defined and which could be taken for a weighing result; falsify displayed, processed or stored weighing results or primary indications; or adjust the instrument or change any adjustment factor, except releasing an adjustment procedure with incorporated devices or, in the case of class I instruments with external adjustment weights as well
pending
202X2011OIML R106-1:20110.2.7.302552
interface (hardware and/or software) which only allows the introduction of such data into the data processing device of an instrument, module or electronic component, which cannot: display data which are not clearly defined and which could be taken for a weighing result; falsify displayed, processed or stored weighing results or primary indications; or adjust the instrument or change any adjustment factor.
pending
20102007OIML R 107-1:2007T.2.1101356
interface (hardware and/or software) which only allows the introduction of such data into the data processing device of an instrument, which cannot: * display data which are not clearly defined and which could be taken as being a weighing result; * falsify displayed, processed or stored weighing results or primary indications; or * adjust the instrument or change any adjustment factor, except releasing an adjustment procedure with incorporated devices
pending
202X2007OIML R 107-1:2007T.2.1101356
interface (hardware and/or software) which only allows the introduction of such data into the data processing device of an instrument, which cannot: display data which are not clearly defined and which could be taken as being a weighing result; falsify displayed, processed or stored weighing results or primary indications; or adjust the instrument or change any adjustment factor, except releasing an adjustment procedure with incorporated devices
pending
202X2023OIML D031:20233.2.5103394
legally relevant software module that handles all data flow to the legally relevant software modul(s) in order to prevent inadmissible influences
pending
